network_summary: Dr. Sinan Razzak is the documented Founder and President of Dental Town Chicago, a 12-office family dental group operating across the Chicagoland area under the unified 'Dental Town Chicago' brand. Individual offices use trade names (Image Dental, Bedford Dental) but all are listed on the official dentaltownchicago.com locator. LinkedIn identifies the legal entity as 'Dental town chicago ltd'. No MSO, management company, or PE investor was found; the network appears founder-operated. The three AO-cluster locations (Oakbrook Terrace, Chicago/Bedford Park, Cicero/Image Dental) are confirmed sub-locations of this 12-office brand.

stale_closed_false_positive_notes: No closures or stale shells found. Bedford Park address listed as '7250 S Cicero Ave Ste F, Chicago, IL 60629' on website; NPPES has same street without suite — same building. Phone on website (708-496-8896) differs from NPPES (312-810-2948) for Bedford Dental LLC — may indicate a secondary line or data lag; the address match is confirmed.
evidence_chain: AO signal: SINAN RAZZAK appears as authorized official on 3 distinct IL GP location NPIs across 3 ZIPs (60181, 60629, 60804). Documentary corroboration: (1) dentaltownchicago.com/locations/ lists all three exact addresses under the Dental Town Chicago brand — Oakbrook (17W679 Roosevelt Rd), Bedford Park (7250 S Cicero Ave Ste F), and Cicero/Image Dental (3020 S Cicero Ave). (2) dentaltownchicago.com/doctor/dr-sinan-razzak/ names him 'Founder and President of Dental Town Chicago' with practice at all locations. (3) LinkedIn: 'Dentist/founder - Dental town chicago ltd'. No MSO, management company, or PE investor found in web search, website footer, or any filing reference.
future_app_notes: Prior-session linkage: backfill71 second pass classified this network as branded_dso with 12 offices. This wave covers 3 of the 12 locations; the remaining 9 (Albany Park, Archer, Avondale, Berwyn, Burbank, Little Village, Melrose Park, Pulaski, Summit) may appear as separate AO clusters or be unmatched in this wave. Confirm Illinois SOS filing for 'Dental Town Chicago Ltd' to establish exact legal entity type and whether a management/MSO layer exists behind the LTD entity. Phone discrepancy at Bedford Dental (website 708-496-8896 vs NPPES 312-810-2948) should be spot-checked. All 12 locations are GP family dental — no specialist exclusion applies.
